content:
only need to read the section:
- art of war
- managing resources
- deckbuilding
The guide is so old
Also since the gear(wheel) isn't specifically tied to a character, you can come up with more flexible strategies
Does hyde play morimens?
I agree with this. Sometimes, using 2 gears for 1 character is better depending on the situation.
yeah cuz they actually played like shit
Whaaat
Your ig isn't merlin?
doesn't really matter since the guide explains general idea and not specifically tied to one condition
True
once you get the general idea, you can adjust to current patch condition
Btw what does the moth wheel actually do? Does it discard only one of the hero cards when you equip it or something else?
New wheel?
When equip give illusion to all enemy skill
Afterward it only illusion to 1 enemy card
Illusion card will be discarded after they complete their turn
Only skills? So no attacks and wheels right
Strike card also, i don't think it applied on wheel card
Ty
Merlin of course
Then why you say what?
Because I just summoned <:spend:1356086121888747531>
Imagine playing famous team and got cooked
do you just
not play story at all
genuinely asking because why is it a key on ch6 posse
Ok and?
Doesn't matter if i have higher posses, i'll still use these two
im saying you should be progressing the story cuz you clearly have units to make it easy but k
Skill issue
im not even talking about traphase here your progression just looks stunted for no reason
Shut up, you lost all my respect for yapping for no reason
if thats all it takes then you didnt have much in the first place
Ofc you didn't have any
ok?
Ok and?
i mean i dont understand what you're upset about
Act whatever you want, just don't  interrupt me then
You understand or not isn't my problem
i mean it kind of is if you're trying to talk about unit kits
I thought I would never live to see the day of random morimens beef.
yeah dunno
honestly does nothing
maybe if combined with a dispeller
she does have a place in para comps
wheel though... just seems unnecessary tbh
youre just getting rid of the opponent's bad cards for them
maybe has a place in hat comp too
its mainly to punish otk decks that arent lily
lotan and helpt want to hold cards for their damage
You can also equip the wheel and then next turn put bleed or debuffs
It can also be used on teams that use chants or skills with multiple uses
btw if you gunshot the wheel does illusion disappear
or it stays until turn is over
once its applied its applied
what a lame
so youre telling me
i can simply backpack it
then gunshot my own wheel
and then apply it again
~~ig that doesnt do anything cause end goal is kill opponent~~
Clem plays pretty weird rn but from my current comp, ryker continues to feel bad to use
The concept this time is abusing ryker and wanda's phatasm cards by using gdoll's ult while disrupting their hand with clem and slowing with ryker
wanda uvhash ryker full phantasm team
But man, ryker needs his own team to make it fun
But then there would be no clem sadly.
Other than paralyze i cant imagine a place for her to go into. Maybe as a faros counter.
im just memeing
On another note, with the extra card and wanda, the other team has to respect wanda's counter quite a bit
Maybe caecus might be the better choice here if I wanna force them into the grinder
